---
title: "Wrack as a Roughness Element"
---

#### Journal Article
**Schmutz, P.P.**, **S.R. Seals**, J. Agin, <sup>UG</sup>, and P. Tereszkiewicz. In Review (2026). Wrack as Dynamic Roughness: Controls on Wind Reduction and Sediment Deposition. *Aeolian Research*.
  - [Preprint PDF]()


#### Conference Presentations
- [ICAR 2026 Poster PDF](files/ICAR_Poster_2026.pdf)


#### Data and Code
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/CGMlabUWF/beachwrack-aeolian-research-2026)
